findings.summary: R8 now parses producer run records and binds artifact metadata rows to runId, bookId, status, artifactIds, stage, and provider fingerprint. The baseline remains partial because stageFingerprint/providerFingerprint are optional in rows and only compared when present, while run records do not carry producer tool/schema version or run-level generation time.

Runtime compatibility still fail-closes on four semantic digests, but embedding model/dimension, package layout version, and runtime reader compatibility are not independently compared by the TS runtime gate or script validator.

R8 adds executable fail-closed tests for forged producer run artifactIds and forged provider fingerprint, but still lacks negative tests for missing stage/provider fingerprints and broader runtime compatibility fields such as embedding dimension and package layout/runtime reader mismatch.
